name: Curried Potatoes with Eggplant (Aloo Baigan Sabji)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ginger, green chilies, and coconut in a blender with 1/3 cup of water until smooth. Add garam masala and pulse for a few seconds. Set aside.
2. Heat ghee in a pan. When hot, add mustard seeds and cumin seeds and fry for a few seconds.
3. Stir in the asafetida and immediately add the potatoes. Stir-fry for 5 minutes.
4. Pour in the mixture from the blender. Add turmeric, coriander, eggplant cut into cubes, salt, and half the fresh coriander.
5. Mix gently to avoid breaking the vegetables. Reduce heat and continue frying until the liquid has evaporated.
6. Mix in lemon juice and remaining fresh coriander. Serve.
